data.title: Rising Workloads Expose Structural Limits in IT Operations, Says Info-Tech Research Group
data.description: According to a report by Info-Tech Research Group, Infrastructure and Operations (I&O) teams are finding it challenging to keep up with increasing technological demands. The report highlights that operational workloads are using up capacity, hindering the ability to plan for the future effectively. This has led to numerous IT organizations becoming bottlenecks due to the overwhelming workload. The study emphasizes the need for these teams to address this issue promptly to ensure efficient operations.

data.title: UCB Selects Rowen for $2B Biopharmaceutical Manufacturing Campus
data.description: A significant achievement was reached by Rowen's innovation community model as they welcomed their first tenant in Gwinnett County, Georgia. This marks the beginning of a thriving life sciences hub in the region. The State of Georgia, Gwinnett County, and the Rowen Foundation jointly announced this milestone on March 24, 2026. This news signals a bright future for the area, with potential for growth and development.

data.title: NABR CONDEMNS ALLEGED BREAK-IN AND THEFT AT MIDWEST RESEARCH AND BREEDING FACILITY
data.description: On March 15th, a group of animal rights extremists reportedly trespassed and vandalized a Midwest research and breeding facility. The National Association for Biomedical Research strongly condemns these unlawful actions.

data.title: Ondas Reloads With $1.5B Cash, Aggressive Deals And 100%+ Upside Target
data.description: Ondas Inc. (NASDAQ: ONDS) announced impressive quarterly results, exceeding expectations with a revenue of $30.1 million in the fourth quarter, marking a significant increase of 198% from the previous quarter and a remarkable surge of 629% compared to the previous year. The boost in revenue was primarily driven by Ondas Autonomous Systems, showcasing strong performance with a high volume of Optimus and Iron Drone shipments, along with contributions from recent acquisitions. The gross profit also saw substantial growth, reaching $12.7 million with a widened gross margin of 42%, compared to 21% in the previous year. Despite the increase in operating expenses due to rapid scaling, the company displayed resilience with better fixed-cost absorption in autonomous systems. Although Ondas reported a loss of 36 cents per share and a wider GAAP net loss, investors remained optimistic about the company's growth trajectory. This success has led to an enhanced 2026 outlook, prompting an analyst to raise the price target for ONDS stock.
Trump ends remarks at the White House.

data.title: Oligo Security Named to Fast Company’s Annual List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: Israeli company Oligo Security has been recognized by Fast Company as one of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026. This prestigious list highlights businesses making a significant impact on industry and culture with their innovations. Oligo Security emphasizes the importance of runtime security, stating that it is the most dependable method for modern cloud security. This acknowledgment underscores the company's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions in the cybersecurity sector.

data.title: eHub Launches Pack, Inventory, and Orchestrate API to Power the Next Era of Carrier Orchestration
data.description: In Sandy, Utah on March 24, 2026, a top company in Carrier Orchestration, eHub, revealed the introduction of three significant platform advancements. These include eHub Pack®, eHub Inventory®, and the eHub Orchestrate® API. These new additions aim to broaden eHub's platform functionalities and enhance their offerings for customers.

data.title: ReDEFY Launches as the First Applied AI Salesforce Partner, Bringing the Agent Outcome Engine and the Agentic Implementation Engine to Elevate the Salesforce Ecosystem
data.description: A tech company located in Herndon, Virginia, has introduced a new platform aiming to enhance the reliability of Agentforce and speed up Industry Cloud delivery. They have also disclosed their sponsorship as a Premier Innovator for the Salesforce Agentforce World Tour in New York. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, via a press release from PRNewswire.

data.title: In HelloNation, Diesel Repair Expert James Riddle Explains Why Diesel Trucks Go Into Limp Mode
data.description: In Midland, Texas, on March 24, 2026, an article discusses the reasons behind diesel trucks losing power and entering limp mode during heavy-duty usage. Sensor failures, turbocharger issues, fuel system problems, and DEF system faults are identified as key factors triggering this mode. These malfunctions occur frequently, leading to a significant number of trucks experiencing reduced performance in demanding conditions.

data.title: XR Global Launches the World’s First Augmented Reality Online Casino Experience Across iOS, Android and the Immersive Web
data.description: In Puerto Rico, XR Global, Inc. has officially launched the world's first Augmented Reality (AR) online casino games. XR Global is a leading Extended Reality (XR) technologies developer in the iGaming market with a Patent Pending Technology for its Cross-XR Platform. The AR games are now accessible on iOS, Android, and the Immersive Web, marking a significant advancement in online casino gaming. This pioneering move solidifies XR Global's position as an innovator in the industry, providing a unique gaming experience for players worldwide.

data.title: Omma by Spline Unlocks Production-Ready Motion Design in Minutes
data.description: SAN FRANCISCO--A new AI canvas for creativity called Omma has been launched by Spline, a platform for interactive 2D and 3D motion design. This tool allows users to create interactive digital experiences using natural language prompts in just minutes, even without prior experience. Teams can now easily add interaction and motion to their brand, marketing, and product with Omma, and publish instantly. No extensive learning curve is needed to incorporate motion design and 3D, making it accessible to all.

data.title: Bitcoin Drops Below $70,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Slide 2%
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading at $69,479.56, below $70,000 despite an influx of ETF investments and a slight uptick in market sentiment. Other cryptocurrency prices include Ethereum at $2,118.48, Solana at $89.11, XRP at $1.39, Dogecoin at $0.09295, and Shiba Inu at $0.056092. In the last 24 hours, 80,886 traders were liquidated, totaling $174.56 million in losses, as per Coinglass data. Meanwhile, spot Bitcoin ETFs saw net inflows of $167.2 million on Monday, according to SoSoValue data, while spot Ethereum ETFs experienced net outflows of $16.2 million. Some of the top gainers in the past day were Bittensor, Kite, and Artificial Superintelligence Alliance. For more detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.
